items.briefing:
Telstra has introduced bank-verified identity checks in its stores, meaning customers may be asked to confirm their identity using their banking credentials when purchasing services. This is designed to reduce SIM-swap fraud and identity theft — a genuine security improvement worth being aware of if you visit a Telstra store. Separately, a new exploit targeting Microsoft systems has been released by a known threat group, so it's important that any Microsoft software your organisation uses is fully up to date with the latest patches.

**Practical tip:** Check that automatic updates are enabled on all work devices running Microsoft software to reduce your exposure to newly published exploits.

featured.title: Microsoft, Australian Government sign MOU on cloud, cybersecurity and AI cooperation
featured.quote: Microsoft and Australian Government cybersecurity cooperation signals strengthened national digital infrastructure protection.
